---
title: "Lonely Together Wrangling 1"
author: "Peter Yibo Pan"
date: "2026-03-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(knitr)
theme_set(theme_minimal())
```

Step 1: Import data & initial analysis
```{r data}
LTdata1 <- read_csv("Lonely Together data 1.csv")
glimpse(LTdata1)
```


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```
